_PyFrame_GetLocals OOM NULL-deref (PEP 667 fast path); fixed by Victor Stinner, PR #146124, backported.

itertools._grouper.__next__ same reentrant UAF as groupby (sibling of gh-143543); issue draft, unfiled.

pyo3_rust_status: CONFIRMED 0 filed by this campaign. pyo3-review-toolkit/reports = 5 review runs (pyo3_v1/v2, pyo3_main_v1/v2, pyo3_v3), each SUMMARY.md + per-agent findings + preflight; these are UNFILED internal audit outputs. rust-ext-review-toolkit/reports = 2 runs (cryptography-rust_v1, polars_v1) with REVIEW.md + actionable_items + findings/ + reproducers; also UNFILED drafts/audits. The PyO3/pyo3 (#1683,#2141,#4736,#5341,#5350,#5600,#5807,#5876,#5894,#6048,#6051,#6052,#6058,#6064), PyO3/rust-numpy#509, pola-rs/polars (16 nums), serde-rs/json#160, joshua-maros/ouroboros#38 references are the agents CITING pre-existing upstream issues/PRs (github-mining / version-compat / history agents), NOT artifacts filed by the toolkit. No <ext>-issue-draft that was submitted; no gists; no maintainer outreach recorded.

history_headline.note: history/ is the OLDER archived snapshot: milestones stop at analysis_milestone_report_5.md + ft_review_toolkit_milestone_report.md (_1 only), vs live cext-review-toolkit/reports which has analysis_milestone_report_6 + ft_review_toolkit_milestone_report_3. communication_record.md (164,616 B) present in both history/ and cext-review-toolkit/reports/.

notes: Metadata-only scan; no source files modified. DISTINCT reference count (150 issue/PR + 40 gist) is the union of: github.com issues|pull URLs, owner/repo#NNN qualified refs, gh-NNNNN CPython canonical refs (normalized to python/cpython#NNNNN), plus a manual injection of the zstandard 12-issue filing batch indygreg/python-zstandard#291-#302 (present only as bare #NNN in the milestone table). BARE #NNN refs were deliberately NOT bulk-counted: grep shows ~1.49M bare '#NN' hits dominated by finding/item ORDINALS (monotonic decay from #10=68k occurrences), which would swamp real issue numbers. A handful of small-number bare issue refs cited only in milestone prose are therefore NOT in the distinct count (e.g. APSW issues #30/#32/#33/#34/#35; simplejson PR #356/#360; cpython gh-131757/PR#131758) -- these exist but are not regex-separable from ordinals. Many captured references (esp. PyO3/*, pola-rs/*, most python/cpython gh- refs) are UPSTREAM CITATIONS by the review agents (history/github-mining/version-compat), NOT artifacts filed by the campaign; use milestone_findings for filed COUNTS (issues filed 106+ per cext milestone 6; 13+ per ft milestone 3). report_files 'kind' is HEURISTIC: DRAFT=name matches draft; ANALYSIS=milestone/appendix/agents/findings/preflight/summary/pass/audit/reproducer/etc.; FILED=links a concrete non-devdanzin github issues|pull URL. pyo3/rust-ext = 0 filed (confirmed).
